heading: Clusters
body:
Clusters are now associated with projects. As before, clusters
must have unique names within projects.

Each Atlas [project](projects) supports up to 25 clusters.
If you have questions or need assistance regarding the cluster limit,
[support](atlas-support).

> **See Also:** 
>
> - Manage Project Access
>
> - Manage Project Settings
>
> - [View All Cloud Clusters](view-all-database-deployments)
